title: B31N1429 Battery Compatible with ASUS A501L A501LB A501LX K501L K501LB K501LX K501U K501UB K501UQ R516LB V502LB 0B200-01460100 Laptop Replacement Battery - 4240mAh/48WH 11.4V
features: 【Specifications】Battery Type: Lithium-ion battery; Voltage: 11.4V; Capacity: 48Wh/4240mAh; Color: Black. The battery supports up to 500 charge cycles.
【Compatible Part Numbers】Precisely matches official part numbers B31N1429 and 0B200-01460100.

【Compatible Laptop Models】Perfectly compatible with ASUS laptops: K501 series: K501L, K501LB, K501LX, K501LX-NH52, K501LX-NB52, etc.; A501 series: A501L, A501LB, A501LB5200, etc.; R516 series: R516LB, R516LX, R516UB, etc.; Other series: V502LB, V502LX, etc. Please confirm your computer model before purchasing.

【Safety Certification】The battery is manufactured using Grade A cells, effectively reducing the risk of leakage, ensuring stable output, fast charging, and lower power consumption. The battery incorporates short-circuit, overheat, and overload protection circuits and has passed multiple safety certifications including CE, FCC, RoHS, and UL, ensuring safer and more stable use.
【After-Sales Service】If you have any questions, please feel free to contact customer service. We will provide a satisfactory solution within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Basic information Model B31N1429 Battery type Li-ion Number of cells 3 cells Voltage/Capacity 11.4V, 48Wh/4240mAh Cycle life about 500 charge and discharge cycles Safety certification CE, FCC, UL, etc. Before placing an order, please confirm your device model, original battery model, appearance dimensions and interface type to ensure fit. Compatible Laptop Models compatible with ASUS K501L, K501LB, K501LX Series - K501LB-DM023H, K501LB-DM077D, K501LB-DM096D, K501LB-DM121H, K501LB-DM140D, K501LB-DM140T, K501LB-XX136D, K501LB-XX136T, K501LX-DM037D, K501LX-DM054H, K501LX-DM060H, K501LX-DM104H, K501LX-DM120H, K501LX-DM133H, K501LX-DM145D, K501LX-DM200T, K501LX-EB71, K501LX-NB52, K501LX-NH52 compatible with ASUS K501U, K501UB, K501UQ, K501UX, K501UW Series - K501UB-DM075T, K501UB-DM097T, K501UX-AH71, K501UX-DH71, K501UX-DM022T, K501UX-DM098T, K501UX-DM136T, K501UX-DM312T, K501UX-Q72SX, K501UX-WH74, K501UW-AB78, K501UW-DM013T, K501UW-DM014T, K501UW-DM026T, K501UW-DM039T, K501UW-DM043T, K501UW-FI038T, K501UW-IB74, K501UW-NB72 compatible with ASUS Vivobook ASUS A501L, A501LB, A501LX series compatible with ASUS A501UB, A501UQ, A501UW, A501UX series compatible with ASUS FX51LB, FX51LX series compatible with ASUS R516LB, R516LX, R516UB, R516UQ, R516UW, R516UX series compatible with ASUS V502LB, V502LX, V505LB, V505LX series Note: 1: Discharge the new battery to 10% (not 0%), then charge and cycle 3-4 times to activate the new battery. 2: It is recommended to fully discharge and charge every other month to extend battery life. 3: Do not connect the adapter for a long time when using the battery, otherwise the battery may be damaged. 4: Do not disassemble, squeeze or puncture. Do not throw into fire or water. 5: If you have any questions about installing a new battery, you can search YouTube for battery installation tutorials for your laptop model.
